allow: PowerShell($pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3000,4000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { try { $proc = Get-Process -Id $p -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Matando PID $p \($\($proc.ProcessName\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force } catch { Write-Output "PID $p ya no existe" } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3000,4000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table LocalPort, OwningProcess)

PowerShell($pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3000,4000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Maté PID $p" } catch {} }; Start-Sleep 2; Write-Output "puertos libres")

PowerShell($pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3000,4000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Maté PID $p" } catch {} }; Start-Sleep 2; Write-Output "ok")
